{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032318244970D863E5927C67668DCE"}"},"total":406},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7375321795845718808","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写的很不错啊，至少没有让诸葛亮像别的同人文一样只会像三国演义一样死板的用计谋，不过看现在的故事进度，150章到200章的程度看起来就会把故事写完了吧","text_exts":[{"e":30,"s":26,"text":"三国演义","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%B8%89%E5%9B%BD%E6%BC%94%E4%B9%89&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177426148967668DCE%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227375321795845718808%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227360839190340193304%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%B8%89%E5%9B%BD%E6%BC%94%E4%B9%89%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1717204703,"group_id":"7360839190340193304","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"摸鱼真开心_(:з」∠)_","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2WLTRnL8YrxxHHOxW9tGYI=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/52b8ceb0fd724201a04c2da92a5b1143~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776795684&x-signature=8mdhRzaW8r84Zv93qJdZ%2BB%2BMGak%3D","user_id":"888042704607319","user_name":"青空youo"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"888042704607319","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1725518088,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7360839190340193304","book_info":{"abstract":"苏泽穿越东汉三国，投身刘备帐下，暗度陈仓奇袭吕布，合纵连横大败曹操，立战功无数。
　　计赚樊城后，正当苏泽准备继续替刘备谋夺荆襄之地时，诸葛孔明出山了。
　　得卧龙者可安天下，一朝卧龙出，前人如敝帚！
　　千钧一发之际，苏泽激活好感度系统，只要选择正确选项给出回应，提升对方好感度就能获得系统奖励。
　　自此败刘备，擒赵云，气周瑜，锁二乔……
　　曹操：“子渊可愿为我谋主？”
　　【一.世人皆以丞相为乱世奸雄，而愚以为丞相之志、魏武遗风，必将流传千古，自当誓死不坠丞相之志！】
　　【二.反手一大嘴巴子，鄙夷道：“丞相可愿为我义子？”】
　　【三.听闻丞相生有六女，今后你管我叫义父，我管你叫岳父，咱俩各论各的！ 】
　　看了一眼曹操的好感度，苏泽深吸一口气。
